reviews.comment:
Es una cita obligada para bajar a su parador en la mitad de camino. Alguna gente que lo visita no es respetuosa y está un poco deteriorado
Todos los servicios que ofrece ACA, limpio, con baños aseados, cestos de basura y piletas nuevas para enjuagar,  pero se robaron las canillas y como siempre pagamos justos por pecadores
Los precios del Shop son bastante caros, así que es un lindo lugar para llevar la vianda o tomar unos mates

(Translated by Google)
It's a must-see stop at their rest stop halfway along the route. Some visitors aren't respectful, and it's a bit run-down. All the services offered by ACA are good, clean, with tidy restrooms, trash cans, and new sinks for rinsing, but the faucets were stolen, and as always, the innocent suffer for the guilty. The prices at the shop are quite high, so it's a good place to bring your lunch or have some mate.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCbjhhSHVBRRAB

reviews.comment:
La playera me dijo que cargar el termo agua salía 40 cuando entre al puesto una chica rubia que tiene tapado el arito de la nariz con un pedazo de curita me quiere cobrar 100 pesos a lo q le dije afuera me dijeron 40 y me dice a no son 50 perdon.
SE NOTA Q LAS INTENCIONES FUERON OTRAS LEYENDO LOS COMENTARIOS SOBRE ESTE TEMA DE EL AGUA CALIENTE

(Translated by Google)
The woman at the water stand told me that filling the thermos with hot water cost 40 pesos. When I went inside, a blonde girl with a piece of bandage covering her nose ring tried to charge me 100 pesos. I told her that outside they told me it was 40, and she said, "Oh no, it's 50, sorry."

It's clear that her intentions were different, judging by the comments about this hot water issue.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCdDlldGJBEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente estación. Muchos playeros y surtidores. Los baños limpios y grandes. El mercadito quizád colapsa, buscaría de hacer alguna forma más rápida de cobrar. Después fijarse bien las ofertas. A su vez, tienen algunas opciones de comida muy copadas, más variadad que otros lugares.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent station. Plenty of attendants and pumps. Clean and spacious restrooms. The convenience store might get a bit crowded; they could try to implement a faster checkout process. Also, be sure to check out the special offers. They also have some great food options, more variety than other places.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCdDZXWXJ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
La única de todas que ofrece aire sin cobrar. Baños grandes e impecables de limpieza. Predio para bajar a descansar. Lleno de perritos buenos pidiendo caricias. Shop para comprar y sentarse a consumir

(Translated by Google)
The only one that offers free air conditioning. Large, impeccably clean bathrooms. A place to relax and unwind. Full of friendly dogs begging for pets. A shop where you can shop and sit and enjoy.
